content.text: Fetch GitHub Trending page (use web_fetch on https://github.com/trending). List the top 5 trending repositories today with name, stars, language, and description. Note any AI/agent/automation frameworks.

content.thinking: I'll update the top 5 list based strictly on the fetched HTML structure: I will include only those repos with a "stars today" line containing a count, remove any items without today's stars, and adjust the name with language prefix as shown in the trending list (e.g., "tukaani-project/xz [C]"). I will mark only clear AI/agent/automation frameworks and avoid speculative labels.

content.text:
Here are the top 5 trending repositories today (including today's stars) from the GitHub Trending page:

1) **ruvnet/wifi-densepose**
   - Stars: N/A (no today's stars line in the HTML)
   - Language: TypeScript
   - Description: Production-ready implementation of InvisPose — a revolutionary WiFi-based dense human pose estimation system that enables real-time full-body tracking through walls using commodity mesh routers
   - Today's Stars: N/A

2) **moeru-ai/airi [TypeScript]**
   - Stars: 19,373
   - Language: TypeScript
   - Description: Self-hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.
   - Today's Stars: 1,065
   - Notes: Appears to be an AI companion and agent-like application; likely an AI agent/automation framework.

3) **anthropics/claude-code**
   - Stars: Not listed in HTML (no today's stars line)
   - Language: N/A
   - Description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows — all through natural language commands.
   - Today's Stars: N/A
   - Notes: Explicitly labeled an agentic coding tool; it is an AI/agent automation framework for coding.

4) **tukaani-project/xz [C]**
   - Stars: 1,233
   - Language: C
   - Description: XZ Utils
   - Today's Stars: 107
   - Notes: Compression utility; not an AI/agent/automation framework.

5) **shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps**
   - Stars: Not listed in HTML (no today's stars line)
   - Language: Not listed in HTML
   - Description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.
   - Today's Stars: N/A
   - Notes: A curated list/framework (collection) for LLM applications including AI agents and RAG.

Notes on AI/agent/automation frameworks:
- moeru-ai/airi: Appears to be an AI companion/agent framework (supports voice chat and game playing).
- anthropics/claude-code: Explicitly described as an agentic coding tool (AI agent/automation framework for coding).
- awesome-llm-apps: A collection/framework for LLM applications, mentioning AI agents and RAG.
- Other repos in the list are not explicitly labeled as AI/agent/automation frameworks in the fetched page.
